publishedAbstract: - Not able to add new BackingStore to an existing BucketClass. ~~~ $ yq '.spec' current-bucket-class.yaml {"placementPolicy": {"tiers": [{"backingStores": ["backing-store", "backing-store-new" < < < < < Adding], "placement": "Spread"}]}} ~~~- Adding "backing-store-new" to an existing BucketClass current-bucket-class above failed with "Error: Tier XXX already exists"
publishedTitle: Failed to add BackingStore to existing BucketClass
